title: Implement Real-Time Call Approval via Redis Pub/Sub
problem: _wait_for_approval is placeholder that just sleeps 30s and returns False. High-priority leads never forwarded in real-time.
approach: Implement Redis pub/sub. Publish approval request to channel, subscribe and await response. Add /api/calls/{call_id}/approve endpoint. Wire WebSocket to close the loop.

title: Replace Hardcoded 'nathan' User ID with Multi-Tenant Auth
problem: System hardcoded to user_id='nathan' throughout. Blocks multi-tenancy or SaaS path.
approach: Extract user_id from Twilio phone number mapping. Create phone_number_owners table. On incoming call, look up To number to resolve owner.

title: Bridge call_handler.py and receptionist.py
problem: Two separate call handling paths that are never connected. Production path does greeting→forward via TwiML, AI receptionist sits unused.
approach: When release_ai_receptionist flag is ON, route audio through Pipecat pipeline. Use media stream handler: Deepgram STT → Groq LLM → ElevenLabs/Fish TTS → send audio back.

title: Add Caller Reputation Database and Known Contact Whitelist
problem: handle_known_contact() is TODO. check_caller_history() returns hardcoded empty results. Repeat callers get full interrogation every time.
approach: Build reputation system on caller model. Update on call completion: call count, disposition, trust score. In classify(), check caller table first — auto-classify if ≥3 non-blocked calls.

title: Implement Voicemail Transcription and Smart Notifications
problem: Voicemail creates raw audio file but no transcription. No smart notification routing based on caller classification.
approach: Add Deepgram transcription to voicemail. Send transcript via preferred channel (Telegram/email). Add smart routing based on caller trust score.

title: Add Calendar Integration for Smart Scheduling
problem: No calendar integration. Can't check availability or schedule callbacks.
approach: Integrate Google Calendar API. Check availability before forwarding. Offer callback scheduling for out-of-office times.

title: Implement CRM Integration (Salesforce, HubSpot)
problem: No CRM integration. Call data stays in system.
approach: Integrate with Salesforce/HubSpot. Push caller data and call records. Update contact records with call disposition.

title: Add Call Analytics Dashboard
problem: No analytics on call volumes, classifications, conversion rates.
approach: Build analytics dashboard. Track: call volume over time, classification breakdown, forward rate, avg call duration. Visualize with charts.

title: Implement Multi-Language Support
problem: Only English support. Limits use for international businesses.
approach: Add multilingual LLM support (Groq already multilingual). Add language detection. Allow user to set preferred languages.

title: Add Call Recording and Playback UI
problem: Call recordings exist but no UI to review them.
approach: Add recordings tab in dashboard. Allow playback. Add transcription display alongside recording.
